---
title: "About"
title-block-banner: false
include-in-header:
  - text: |
      <style>
        #title-block-header { display: none !important; }
      </style>
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<article class="about">
  <header class="about-head">
    <div class="eyebrow">about</div>
    <h1>I'm Anurag.</h1>
    <p class="lede">I build things to understand how they actually work.</p>
  </header>

  <section class="about-intro">
    <p>This site is a collection of experiments — ideas turned into working systems, tested, broken, and refined. Each post reflects something I wanted to explore deeply, not just read about.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="about-section">
    <h2>What this is</h2>
    <ul class="about-list">
      <li><span class="k">Experiments</span><span class="sep">—</span>not tutorials</li>
      <li><span class="k">Implementations</span><span class="sep">—</span>not summaries</li>
      <li><span class="k">Results</span><span class="sep">—</span>not opinions</li>
    </ul>
    <p>You'll find projects with code, outputs, and sometimes videos — all grounded in real work.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="about-section">
    <h2>Why I do this</h2>
    <p>I learn best by building.</p>
    <p>This site is how I think, test ideas, and push toward more research-driven work. It's a transition from applying systems to understanding and creating them.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="about-section">
    <h2>Current direction</h2>
    <p>I'm increasingly focused on problems around AI systems, reasoning, and how intelligent systems are designed and evaluated in practice.</p>
  </section>

  <section class="about-section">
    <h2>Elsewhere</h2>
    <ul class="about-links">
      <li><span class="k">GitHub</span><a href="https://github.com/anurag4dsb">github.com/anurag4dsb</a></li>
      <li><span class="k">YouTube</span><a href="https://www.youtube.com/@AnuragBuildsThings">@AnuragBuildsThings</a></li>
      <li><span class="k">LinkedIn</span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/mittalanu/">mittalanu</a></li>
    </ul>
  </section>

  <footer class="about-close">
    <p>If something is here, it's because I built it.</p>
  </footer>
</article>
```
